note: Surge names, governing attribute, and which orders wield them are facts (verified against the order talent trees). 'gist', 'basic', and each talent 'gist' are our own terse paraphrases of the mechanic, never the book's wording. 'attr' uses the system.json attribute keys. Talents list the surge talent trees (mechanics only); '[ranks]' = your ranks in that surge; 'scales' = die size grows with ranks per the Surge Scaling table.

surges.name: Abrasion
surges.gist: control friction; slick or grip surfaces
surges.basic: infuse object/surface (1I/round) -> nearly frictionless; or infuse self to Skate (2F: straight-line Move) and Slide (count 1 size smaller; adv to escape friction/pressure bonds). Foe on a slick surface: Agility vs your Abrasion or fall Prone / drop. Unwilling target: Abrasion vs phys.

talents.name: Frictionless Motion
talents.gist: infused: +10ft move; ignore Slowed from terrain/climb/crawl/swim

talents.name: Graceful Skating
talents.gist: Skate no longer limited to a straight line

talents.name: Reverse Abrasion
talents.gist: add friction instead: cancels surface Slowed; adv on Agility/Athletics to grip/traverse it

talents.name: Slippery Target
talents.gist: infused: attacks can't graze you; Reactive Strikes vs you get disadvantage

talents.name: Slick Combatant
talents.gist: infused: interrupt a Move to act then finish moving; +1d4 (scales) on a mid-move melee hit

talents.name: Smooth Operator
talents.gist: while you hold any Investiture, stay infused free; Skate costs 1 fewer focus

talents.name: Distant Surgebinding
talents.gist: use surges/talents as if reach 20ft, no touch needed

talents.name: Stormlight Reclamation
talents.gist: after infusions tick, end any within reach to reclaim their remaining Investiture

surges.name: Adhesion
surges.basic: Full Lashing: spend 1I+ to stick two unsecured objects in reach (within 5ft), or an object to a surface, together (1I/round). Unwilling: Adhesion vs phys. Break it: Athletics vs your Adhesion.

talents.name: Binding Strike
talents.gist: after a melee hit, spend focus to Lash an object the target holds/wears (auto-succeeds)

talents.name: Binding Shot
talents.gist: use Binding Strike on ranged hits at any range

talents.name: Adhesive Trap
talents.gist: infuse a surface; anyone who touches it is auto-Lashed to it

talents.name: Living Adhesion
talents.gist: Lash characters directly; Lashed to something larger -> Restrained, disadv on physical tests, attacks vs them adv

talents.name: Extended Adhesion
talents.gist: Lashings spend 1I per [ranks] rounds

talents.name: Superior Bond
talents.gist: auto-win the break contest vs foes whose STR <= your [ranks]

talents.name: Stormlight Reclamation
talents.gist: end infusions within reach to reclaim remaining Investiture

talents.name: Distant Surgebinding
talents.gist: reach 20ft, no touch (paired objects still within 5ft)

surges.name: Cohesion
surges.basic: infuse stone (1I/round) -> soft like clay to reshape; resolidifies when it ends. Unwilling target/surface: Cohesion vs phys. Caught in resolidified stone -> Immobilized (Athletics vs your Cohesion to escape).

talents.name: Stone Spear
talents.gist: 1I: ranged Cohesion atk vs phys (60ft), 2d4 impact (scales); spend to knock Prone

talents.name: Sinkhole
talents.gist: 1I: Cohesion vs cog of foes on stone ground; hit -> sink + Immobilized

talents.name: Memories of Stone
talents.gist: 1I: commune 1 round with stone you touch (Cohesion test to interpret)

talents.name: Tunneling
talents.gist: 1I: infuse self to move through stone as difficult terrain, leaving a 5ft tunnel

talents.name: True Stoneshaping
talents.gist: shape stone into complex forms instantly, no extra action/time (Cohesion 2+)

talents.name: Flowing Earth
talents.gist: after using Cohesion, ground pushes you up to 5ft x [ranks] any direction (no Reactive Strike)

talents.name: Unbound Cohesion
talents.gist: use Cohesion on any non-living, non-Invested solid, not just stone (Cohesion 4+)

talents.name: Through the Stone
talents.gist: reach 20ft through a stone surface you touch

surges.name: Division
surges.gist: degrade, burn, or break down matter
surges.basic: decay what you touch. Character: 1I, melee Division atk vs spir, 3d4 spirit (scales); 0 health -> crumbles to dust, dies. Object/area: spend I by size; under pressure first test Division vs material DC (air 0 / smoke 5 / liquid 10 / flesh 15 / solid 20).

talents.name: Bodily Decay
talents.gist: spend on a Division hit -> inflict an injury on a struck foe

talents.name: Eroding Escape
talents.gist: 1I+ to end that many Immobilized/Restrained/physical-disadv effects on self or ally in reach

talents.name: Igniting Division
talents.gist: 1I+ to set the target ablaze (Afflicted) that many rounds; nearby fire = dangerous terrain dealing your Division mod

talents.name: Gout of Flame
talents.gist: 3I: Division atk vs phys on each target in an enlarged area, 3d4 energy (scales)

talents.name: Devastating Division
talents.gist: roll one extra damage die on Division

talents.name: Spark Sending
talents.gist: reach 20ft along a solid surface to the target

talents.name: Inescapable Spark
talents.gist: Division reach = spren bond range along a surface; no line of effect needed; foes can't Brace vs it

talents.name: Unleashed Entropy
talents.gist: Division costs 1 fewer; Under-Pressure DCs -5

surges.name: Gravitation
surges.basic: Basic Lashing: 1I+ to redirect a target's gravity (1I/round) at your gravitation rate (starts 25ft). Willing char/self: gain a matching flying rate. Object: move it up to the rate each turn. Unwilling: Gravitation vs phys, target Restrained while moved.

talents.name: Flying Ace
talents.gist: rate -> 40ft; mid-flight spend 1 focus for a melee attack, then keep flying

talents.name: Stable Flight
talents.gist: self-Lashed: ranged attacks ignore flying/unstable-footing disadvantage

talents.name: Gravitational Slam
talents.gist: Lash a target into a surface: 1d4 impact/10ft moved (scales); Avoid Danger halves

talents.name: Lashing Shot
talents.gist: hurl an object: spend I = distance/rate; ranged Gravitation atk vs phys, 2d4 impact (scales)

talents.name: Multiple Lashings
talents.gist: after moving an unwilling foe, infuse up to [ranks] Investiture to prolong it

talents.name: Group Flight
talents.gist: out of combat, Lash up to [ranks] extra willing chars free

talents.name: Aerial Squadron
talents.gist: use Group Flight in combat (Gravitation 3+)

talents.name: Master of the Skies
talents.gist: while you hold any Investiture, stay infused with Gravitation free

surges.name: Illumination
surges.basic: Lightweave: 1I+ to project a light/sound illusion within spren bond range (simple object: 1I/10min; character/complex: 1I/round). Disguise self free while Invested. Convincing a complex illusion: Illumination vs cog; scrutiny: Illumination vs Perception.

talents.name: Distracting Illusion
talents.gist: 1I: illusory double on self/ally; attacks vs them get disadvantage and can't graze until one misses

talents.name: Disorienting Flash
talents.gist: 1I: burst in an area, Illumination vs cog -> Disoriented EONT

talents.name: Lingering Lightweavings
talents.gist: anchor an illusion to a sphere; it moves with the sphere, 1I per [ranks] rounds

talents.name: Spiritual Illumination
talents.gist: 2I: make an ally Determined and Focused

talents.name: Multiplicative Lightweaving
talents.gist: maintain up to [ranks] extra illusions free

talents.name: Painful Truth
talents.gist: 2I: Illumination vs spir -> Slowed; foe must Move away or spend focus to stay

talents.name: Stormlight Reclamation
talents.gist: end illusions within range to reclaim remaining Investiture

surges.name: Progression
surges.basic: Growth: 1I to rapidly grow a plant/seed up to surge size. Regrowth: infuse a character (1I/round); each of their turns they recover 1d4 + your Progression mod (scales).

talents.name: Injury Regrowth
talents.gist: 2I to cure a temporary injury, 3I for a permanent one

talents.name: Explosive Growth
talents.gist: 1I: Progression atk vs phys in an area, 2d4 impact/keen (scales); spend to Immobilize hits

talents.name: Swift Regeneration
talents.gist: Regenerate for 1d6 + mod (scales); allies you heal add your mod to injury rolls (Progression 2+)

talents.name: Overgrowth
talents.gist: grow a plant past its limits (DC 15); +2d4 to its health (scales)

talents.name: Extended Regrowth
talents.gist: Regrowth spends 1I per [ranks] rounds

talents.name: Reliable Progression
talents.gist: Progression dice can't roll below your [ranks] (Progression 2+)

talents.name: From the Brink
talents.gist: 3I to revive a willing character dead < 1 min (returns Unconscious at 0 health) (Progression 3+)

talents.name: Font of Life
talents.gist: Progression and its talents cost 1 fewer

surges.name: Tension
surges.basic: 1I+ to infuse a soft object (1I/round) -> fully rigid; can shape it first. Hardened Defense: infuse worn/wrapped cloth for +2 phys defense (one at a time). Unwilling target: Tension vs phys -> Slowed + disadv on physical tests.

talents.name: Tension Parry
talents.gist: reaction before a phys-defense hit: infuse clothing for +2 defense, can turn a hit into a miss

talents.name: Rigged Weaponry
talents.gist: 1I: +10ft melee reach; on a melee hit spend focus to Tension an object the target holds

talents.name: Cloth Mastery
talents.gist: shape Tension objects into complex forms instantly (Tension 2+)

talents.name: Clothsmith
talents.gist: Hardened Defense gives +4; Tension-made weapons get an extra d4 (scales)

talents.name: Surface Tension
talents.gist: stiffen a liquid's surface to walk on it like ground

talents.name: Fine Control
talents.gist: infuse an object you control: move it 25ft, act, attack 2d4 (scales) using your Tension

talents.name: Extended Tension
talents.gist: infusions spend 1I per [ranks] rounds; held objects maintained free

talents.name: Stormlight Reclamation
talents.gist: end infusions within reach to reclaim remaining Investiture

surges.name: Transformation
surges.basic: Soulcast: touch a non-living object, test Transformation (DC by Essence-category shift: same/adjacent 10, +5 per extra category) and spend I by size to change it to another material. Fail -> can't retry that object this scene.

talents.name: Living Soulcasting
talents.gist: 1I: melee Transformation atk vs spir of a living target, 3d4 spirit (scales); 0 health -> dies

talents.name: Soulcast Defense
talents.gist: reaction vs a projectile: Transformation (DC = the attack); success misses + transmutes the projectile

talents.name: Soulcast Parry
talents.gist: use Soulcast Defense vs melee attacks too

talents.name: Flamecasting
talents.gist: add a Flame category; Soulcasting to flame attacks each char within 5ft, 2d4 energy (scales)

talents.name: Bloodcasting
talents.gist: 1I (DC 15): cleanse a target's poison and cut one injury's recovery by 5 days

talents.name: Persistent Transformation
talents.gist: non-living Soulcast DC capped at 15; may retry failed objects (extra I per prior fail) (Transformation 2+)

talents.name: Expansive Transmuter
talents.gist: non-living Soulcast costs 2 fewer Investiture

talents.name: Distant Surgebinding
talents.gist: reach 20ft, no touch needed

surges.name: Transportation
surges.gist: open passages and travel via Shadesmar
surges.basic: 1I+ to peer into Shadesmar within spren bond range; each Investiture buys one effect: read emotions/motives, locate people by their flame, or sense Investiture (Radiants, Fused, Shardblades, fabrials).

talents.name: Cognitive Farsight
talents.gist: spot in Shadesmar out to 3x spren bond range; while Invested, always know north + nearest settlement

talents.name: Cognitive Vision
talents.gist: also read an enemy's intent (Transportation vs cog -> they get disadvantage) and locate nearby objects

talents.name: Realmic Evasion
talents.gist: reaction before a hit: Transportation (DC = the attack); success misses (2nd Ideal)

talents.name: Realmic Step
talents.gist: DC 15 + 2I: blink through Shadesmar to an open spot in spren-bond range (no Reactive Strike)

talents.name: Elsecalling
talents.gist: 1I Physical->Cognitive; DC 20 + 2I to return (3rd Ideal)

talents.name: Elsegate
talents.gist: after a long rest, transport self + up to 10 to a known Oathgate/perpendicularity (4th Ideal)

talents.name: Shared Transportation
talents.gist: when you transport, spend 1I+ to bring that many extra characters (Transportation 4+)

talents.name: Realmwalker
talents.gist: auto-succeed Transportation tests made for talents
